question: HYPE Up or Down - March 21, 12AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the HYPE/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the HYPE/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/futures/HYPEUSDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance HYPE/USDT, not according to other exchanges or trading pairs.

question: Will FC Andorra win on 2026-04-01?
description:
In the upcoming game, scheduled for April 1, 2026
If FC Andorra wins, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve "No".
This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: FC Andorra vs. Málaga CF
events.description: This event is for the upcoming La Liga 2 game, scheduled for Wednesday, April 1, 2026 between FC Andorra and Málaga CF.

eventMetadata.context_description: Málaga CF's impressive recent form—unbeaten in five La Liga 2 matches including road wins—clashes with FC Andorra's stubborn home defense at high-altitude Estadi Nacional, keeping trader probabilities dead-even at 50% across win, draw, and Málaga victory. Official injury reports show no major absences for either side, amplifying uncertainty in this mid-table scrap where upsets thrive amid playoff positioning pressures and evenly split momentum.

events.description: This event is for the upcoming La Liga 2 game, scheduled for Wednesday, April 1, 2026 between SD Huesca and Cultural y Deportiva Leonesa.

eventMetadata.context_description: Racing Club's home strength at El Sardinero, where they've won four of their last five Segunda División matches, is closely counterbalanced by Sporting Gijón's resilient away form, including draws against top sides like Espanyol and Leganés. Recent developments show no major injuries reported on official team sheets, with both squads at near-full strength—Racing relying on forward Andrés Martín's scoring streak, while Gijón's Nikola Pavlovic anchors midfield effectively. Head-to-head history is tight, with three draws in the last five encounters, fueling trader consensus on a low-scoring stalemate possibility. Momentum from Racing's midweek rest versus Gijón's fatigue adds uncertainty, keeping implied probabilities bunched amid promotion stakes.

question: Will Real Racing Club vs. Real Sporting de Gijón end in a draw?
description:
In the upcoming game, scheduled for April 1, 2026
If the game ends in a draw, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve to "Yes".
This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - March 21, 4AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BTC/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other exchanges or trading pairs.

question: Counter-Strike: 3DMAX vs FOKUS REALITY (BO1) - Urban Riga Open #3 Group A
description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between 3DMAX and FOKUS REALITY in the Urban Riga Open #3 Group A, initially scheduled for March 23 at 4:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "3DMAX" if 3DMAX win the match against FOKUS REALITY.

This market will resolve to "FOKUS REALITY" if FOKUS REALITY win the match against 3DMAX.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

question: Map 1: Odd/Even Total Kills?
description:
This market will resolve to "Odd" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 1 is an odd number.

This market will resolve to "Even" if the total combined kills by both teams in Map 1 is an even number.

"Total combined kills" includes all kills recorded during the match across all rounds, including kills during regulation rounds and overtime rounds if applicable. Team kills (friendly fire) and self-inflicted deaths (e.g., falling damage, own grenade) do not count as kills for the purposes of this market.

If no kills are recorded in Map 1, or if Map 1 is canceled (not played at all), or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is not played because the series result has already been determined (e.g., a team clinches the series before Map 1 is needed), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If Map 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - March 21, 5AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BTC/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other exchanges or trading pairs.

question: Will the highest temperature in London be 9°C or below on March 23?
description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the London City Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 23 Mar '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the London City Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/gb/london/EGLC.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus favors a mild high of 14°C in London on March 23 at 32.5% implied probability, closely trailed by 13°C (23.5%) and 15°C (16%), driven by the UK Met Office's latest ensemble forecasts showing above-average temperatures under a developing high-pressure ridge from the Azores, which promotes southerly airflow and reduced cloud cover. Differentiating factors include model spread in ECMWF and GFS runs: warmer 14-15°C outcomes hinge on sustained clear skies maximizing solar insolation, while 13°C edges higher if Atlantic moisture introduces partial cloudiness, tempering daytime heating amid London's urban heat island effect. Historical late-March norms (11-12°C median) underscore the bullish sentiment from recent mild trends, though short-range updates could shift odds as resolution nears.

This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the London City Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 23 Mar '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the London City Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/gb/london/EGLC.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus favors a mild high of 14°C in London on March 23 at 32.5% implied probability, closely trailed by 13°C (23.5%) and 15°C (16%), driven by the UK Met Office's latest ensemble forecasts showing above-average temperatures under a developing high-pressure ridge from the Azores, which promotes southerly airflow and reduced cloud cover. Differentiating factors include model spread in ECMWF and GFS runs: warmer 14-15°C outcomes hinge on sustained clear skies maximizing solar insolation, while 13°C edges higher if Atlantic moisture introduces partial cloudiness, tempering daytime heating amid London's urban heat island effect. Historical late-March norms (11-12°C median) underscore the bullish sentiment from recent mild trends, though short-range updates could shift odds as resolution nears.

question: Ethereum Up or Down - March 21, 6AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the ETH/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the ETH/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/ETH_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance ETH/USDT, not according to other exchanges or trading pairs.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket heavily favors a Paris high of 16°C (41%) on March 23, driven by the latest ECMWF and Météo-France ensemble forecasts showing mild highs in the mid-teens under a building high-pressure ridge over Western Europe. This aligns with recent southerly airflow advecting warmer Atlantic air, following a pattern of above-average spring temperatures—Paris March norms hover around 13°C but recent days have hit 15-17°C. GFS model runs updated yesterday reinforce 15-17°C as the peak cluster, tempering earlier bullishness on 18°C+ amid cloud cover risks and diurnal variability; low odds for extremes reflect stable barotropic conditions minimizing outliers.

question: Solana Up or Down - March 21, 6AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the SOL/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the SOL/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/SOL_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance SOL/USDT, not according to other exchanges or trading pairs.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus clusters tightly around 28–30°C for Sao Paulo's March 23 peak, driven by INMET and ECMWF model ensembles forecasting mild highs under a weakening subtropical ridge, with 29°C edging ahead on blended guidance showing urban heat island amplification offset by southerly winds. Differentiating factors include low-level moisture from recent Atlantic inflow favoring cloudier skies and 28°C caps, versus clearer breaks enabling 30°C bursts as seen in GFS 00z runs; historical March 23 averages hover at 27.5°C, but today's soundings indicate 1–2°C upside potential if diurnal heating dominates pre-frontal clearing. Odds hinge on afternoon convective timing, per latest radar trends.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus clusters tightly around 28–30°C for Sao Paulo's March 23 peak, driven by INMET and ECMWF model ensembles forecasting mild highs under a weakening subtropical ridge, with 29°C edging ahead on blended guidance showing urban heat island amplification offset by southerly winds. Differentiating factors include low-level moisture from recent Atlantic inflow favoring cloudier skies and 28°C caps, versus clearer breaks enabling 30°C bursts as seen in GFS 00z runs; historical March 23 averages hover at 27.5°C, but today's soundings indicate 1–2°C upside potential if diurnal heating dominates pre-frontal clearing. Odds hinge on afternoon convective timing, per latest radar trends.

question: XRP Up or Down - March 21, 6AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the XRP/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the XRP/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/XRP_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance XRP/USDT, not according to other exchanges or trading pairs.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus clusters tightly around 23-25°C for Buenos Aires' highest temperature on March 23, driven by the latest ensemble forecasts from ECMWF and GFS models indicating a mild late-summer day with highs in that narrow band amid lingering southerly winds and partial cloud cover. Argentina's Servicio Meteorológico Nacional aligns with this, projecting 23-24°C based on recent soundings showing stable low-level moisture suppressing peaks above 25°C, while historical March data (averaging 27-28°C) underscores the anomaly from a recent cool front. Model divergence on afternoon convective activity differentiates outcomes: clearer skies favor 25°C, denser clouds tilt toward 23°C, with low odds for extremes reflecting high predictability.

question: Dogecoin Up or Down - March 21, 6AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the DOGE/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the DOGE/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/DOGE_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance DOGE/USDT, not according to other exchanges or trading pairs.

question: HYPE Up or Down - March 21, 6AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the HYPE/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the HYPE/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/futures/HYPEUSDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance HYPE/USDT, not according to other exchanges or trading pairs.

eventMetadata.context_description: Latest Environment Canada and ECMWF model runs pinpoint Toronto's March 23 high near 2°C under persistent cloud cover and light snow from a lingering cold front, driving the tight race among 1°C (21.5%), 2°C (28.5%), and 3°C (24.0%) odds. Trader consensus reflects ensemble means of 1.5-2.5°C, with differentiation hinging on boundary layer mixing and solar insolation: overcast skies limit daytime heating to 1-2°C per soundings, while any diurnal clearing could boost to 3°C via enhanced shortwave radiation. Below-normal temps align with La Niña patterns suppressing jet stream ridging, against a March 23 climatological average of 5°C; monitor 12Z GFS/GEM updates for front timing shifts.

question: BNB Up or Down - March 21, 6AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BNB/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BNB/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BNB_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BNB/USDT, not according to other exchanges or trading pairs.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader sentiment clusters tightly around 50-53°F highs for Seattle on March 23, driven by the latest NOAA and ECMWF model ensembles projecting daytime maxima in that narrow band amid persistent marine stratus clouds and light southerly winds capping temperatures. The National Weather Service's short-range forecast aligns with a 51-52°F peak under partly cloudy skies, edging out slightly cooler 50-51°F odds due to subtle ensemble spreads where GFS runs trend 1-2°F warmer than cooler Euro analogs. Historical March 23 averages hover near 54°F, but a lingering cool upper-air pattern suppresses potential warming; key uncertainty lies in afternoon cloud breaks, which could nudge outcomes toward 52-53°F if solar insolation dominates late-day. Upcoming 12z model updates will likely sharpen this razor-thin differentiation.
